label: Proof-Early Enterprise
prompt: Desktop landing page mockup for Breathe, enterprise AI hiring SaaS. Palantir seriousness, luminous throughput, hiring workflow specificity. Hard, precise, technological, operational, high-volume. Avoid chatbot, ATS replacement, generic HR SaaS, sci-fi. Warm light neutral background, graphite structure, sparse lime and cold blue accents. Compact editorial grotesk typography, premium product-marketing layout. Real frontline environments with subtle computational overlays, workflow logic, queues, routing, throughput. Sections: hero, compact proof bar, friction section, mechanism section, workflow autonomy section, ATS fit section, business outcomes, enterprise trust, use cases, final CTA. Hero: "Automate the manual work between application and hire." Support: "Fill more roles, faster", "The workflow moves itself", "Works on top of your ATS". Include restrained proof strip with placeholder metrics or logos. Realistic full-page landing screenshot, 16:9.
